gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/113)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/113)
text: كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) يَسْتَاكُ عَرْضاً وَ يَأْكُلُ هَرْتاً وَ قَالَ الْهَرْتُ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ بِأَصَابِعِهِ جَمِيعاً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, raising it, said,
‘Amir Al-Momineenasws used to brush hisasws teeth sideways and eat in a Herta manner’. And heasws said: ‘Al-Herta is that heasws ate with all of hisasws fingers together’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Muhammad in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would brush his teeth widthwise and eat using all of his fingers.’”
